title: Advisor Evolution Lifecycle — observation to adoption with cohort gate and watchdog
what: The evolution lifecycle governs how advisor behavior changes are proposed, validated, approved, and monitored. It spans five stages: observation recording, hypothesis formation, hub-side cohort gate, lead approval, and watchdog monitoring post-adoption. The EvolutionEngine class in advisors/evolution_engine.py implements all spoke-side stages. Hub-side cohort gate is managed by the Architect advisor.
why: Without a structured lifecycle, advisor behavior changes are applied ad-hoc with no validation, no fleet-wide consistency, and no rollback safety. The lifecycle ensures that high-risk changes require broader evidence before adoption and that degradation is automatically detected and reversed.

use_cases.title: Spoke advisor detects recurring pattern
use_cases.trigger: record_observation() called 3+ times with fired=True for same pattern_id
use_cases.outcome: check_and_form_if_ready() creates a hypothesis lug in bytype/hypothesis/open/

use_cases.title: Hub cohort gate confirms pattern is fleet-wide
use_cases.trigger: Architect advisor reads hypothesis, checks cohort_confirmation_count across all spokes
use_cases.outcome: Hub upserts cohort_confirmation_count >= 3 to advisor_hypotheses table; spoke reads count via get_cohort_confirmation_count()

use_cases.title: Lead approves adoption
use_cases.outcome: Hypothesis status set to 'adopted', advisor_versions row upserted, watchdog window started

use_cases.title: Watchdog detects act-rate degradation
use_cases.trigger: auto_rollback_if_degraded() called during nightly advisor run
use_cases.outcome: Pre-adoption YAML restored, lifecycle event written, finding lug created

patterns.name: Hypothesis type is 'hypothesis', not 'other'
patterns.description: Hypothesis lugs use type='hypothesis' and live in bytype/hypothesis/open/. They are NOT lug type 'other'. The status field supports: open, testing, confirmed, rejected, adopted.

patterns.name: Low-risk hypotheses can be adopted without cohort gate
patterns.description: evolution_risk='low' hypotheses may skip hub cohort gate (cohort_confirmation_count=0 acceptable). Medium and high risk require hub-side confirmation.

patterns.name: advisor_versions upserted on adoption
patterns.description: When promote_hypothesis() transitions to 'adopted', a row is written to advisor_versions with advisor_id, wheel_id, version, definition_yaml, and activated_at.

patterns.name: Corpus test observations use a dedicated observation_type
patterns.description: record_corpus_test_observation() writes observations with observation_type='corpus_test' to the corpus-test-{test_id} advisor buffer, enabling separation from behavioral observations in analysis.

how.trigger: EvolutionEngine.record_observation() called by advisors after each activation
steps_summary: 1. Advisor calls record_observation(advisor_id, pattern_id, fired, user_response) — writes to local JSONL buffer + Supabase best-effort
2. Advisor calls check_and_form_if_ready() — if threshold crossed and no open hypothesis, form_hypothesis() creates hypothesis lug in bytype/hypothesis/open/
3. Hub Architect advisor reads hypothesis, checks fleet-wide cohort_confirmation_count, upserts back to advisor_hypotheses
4. Lead calls promote_hypothesis(hyp_id, 'testing') then promote_hypothesis(hyp_id, 'confirmed') — optional intermediate stages
5. Lead calls promote_hypothesis(hyp_id, 'adopted') — updates hypothesis lug status, upserts advisor_versions row, calls start_watchdog()
6. Nightly: auto_rollback_if_degraded() checks act-rate degradation within watchdog window; rolls back if >30% drop
constraints: Medium and high risk hypotheses require cohort_confirmation_count >= 3 before promotion to 'confirmed'
Watchdog windows: low=14 days, medium=28 days, high=56 days
Corpus test observations write to a separate advisor buffer prefixed 'corpus-test-'

triggers: After each advisor activation (fired=True or fired=False)
On lead decision to approve or reject a hypothesis
not_when: Hypotheses should not be formed for single-occurrence patterns (count < threshold)
when.frequency: Per advisor activation + nightly watchdog check

inputs: Supabase advisor_hypotheses table — hypothesis state with cohort count
outputs: Supabase advisor_versions table — version history on adoption
state_changes: observations_buffer.jsonl grows by one line per record_observation() call
hypothesis lug status updated by promote_hypothesis()

constraints: EvolutionEngine is spoke-side only — hub cohort gate is hub-side (Architect advisor)
Rollback is best-effort when pre_adoption_backup.yaml is missing
Observation IDs are uuid4 — globally unique across spokes

health.verification_note: All 32 behavioral tests pass. All 8 required EvolutionEngine methods present. bytype/hypothesis/ directory exists.

outcome: Verified complete: all 32 behavioral tests pass, all 8 required EvolutionEngine methods confirmed present, bytype/hypothesis/ directory exists, health fields accurate. No gaps found.
perceive: Read this spec (spec-evolution-lifecycle-v1). Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/evolution_engine.py — verify all required methods exist: record_observation(), check_and_form_if_ready(), form_hypothesis(), promote_hypothesis(), start_watchdog(), auto_rollback_if_degraded(), record_corpus_test_observation(), get_cohort_confirmation_count(). Read tests/behavioral/test_evolution_engine.py — confirm 32 tests present and check last run status. Check WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/hypothesis/ directory exists. Review health fields on this spec for staleness.
execute: Run: python3 -m pytest tests/behavioral/test_evolution_engine.py -q --tb=short to confirm all 32 tests pass. For any missing method in EvolutionEngine: create an impl lug targeting WAI-Spoke/advisors/evolution_engine.py with the gap described in perceive/execute/verify, append it to impl_lugs[] on this spec, routed_to=LOCAL, model_fit=haiku. If all methods present and tests pass: update health.last_impl_lug_completed and health.spec_drift_risk. If bytype/hypothesis/ directory missing: mkdir -p WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/hypothesis/open/.
verify: All 32 behavioral tests pass (python3 -m pytest tests/behavioral/test_evolution_engine.py). EvolutionEngine has all 8 required methods. WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/hypothesis/ directory exists. health.test_coverage='behavioral' and health.test_count=32 match actual test file. No open spec_drift_risk=high flags on this spec.
